title: OLI Waybill
description: A shipping waybill conforming to the Open Logistics Interconnect standard. Includes a GS1-compatible EPC identifier, a physical claim token, and a currentCustodian pointer for federated tracking resolution.

trackingUrl.description: Permanent public URL that resolves to this waybill's tracking page.

epc.description: GS1-style Electronic Product Code for this waybill.

claimToken.description: Short alphanumeric token printed on the physical waybill. Single-use. Proves physical handoff from sender to first operator without requiring digital auth.

status.description: Current status of the shipment leg held by the responding operator.

currentCustodian.description: Pointer to the operator currently holding custody. Used by the OLI Switch for federated tracking resolution — the switch queries this operator's trackingEndpoint to get live location.

operatorId.description: The operator's UUID in the OLI Switch registry.

trackingEndpoint.description: Base URL of this operator's trackam instance. The switch appends /api/shipments/:id with Accept: application/ld+json to resolve current tracking state.

custodyType.description: Whether the current custodian is a static hub/warehouse or a rider in active transit. Determines how the switch resolves live location.

declaredValueNgn.description: Declared goods value in Nigerian Naira.
